title: WH_ERROR_NOTFOUND -2104 needs a citation to wolfHSM source
description: The constant WH_ERROR_NOTFOUND = -2104 is cross-referenced to the wolfhsm/wh_error.h header but there is no link to the exact line or file. If wolfHSM ever renumbers errors (unlikely but possible), the match arm 'Err(wolfhsm::Error::Wh { code }) if code == WH_ERROR_NOTFOUND' would silently stop firing, causing find_by_label to propagate Backend errors on every NVM scan. Fix: add a reference URL or at minimum the wolfHSM Git SHA this was verified against.
